title: erysimum leucanthemum subsp. versicolor
intro: Erysimum leucanthemum subsp. versicolor, also known as wallflower, is a flowering plant species within the family Brassicaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Erysimum leucanthemum subsp. versicolor can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
